title: aegilops triuncialis subsp. brachyathera
intro: Aegilops triuncialis subsp. brachyathera, also known as short awned spelt wheat or short awned spelt, is a plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aegilops triuncialis subsp. brachyathera include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or dried extracts to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
